name: Summarize on Agent Stop
description: When the agent finishes a session, summarize what was done and update progress tracking

then.prompt: The agent session has ended. Write a brief summary of what was accomplished in this session. If a progress.md file exists in the workspace, update it with: the last completed step, what was changed, and the recommended next action. Keep the summary concise — 3 to 5 bullet points maximum.
